# Session 91 Summary

## Metadata
- Session: 91 (iter-091)
- No prover ran (`no_prover_lane: true`)
- Sorry count: 0 before, 0 after
- Targets attempted: none

## No-Prover-Lane Condition
Intentional skip. Mechanical gates: 0 inline sorries; all 4 DAG frontier nodes lack Lean decls (2 are dead-ends with used-by=0); main theorem `cech_computes_higherDirectImage` already proved. Build chain for iter-087 CSILeg 5-file split still incomplete.

| File | Olean | Timestamp | Note |
|------|-------|-----------|------|

| CechHigherDirectImage | STALE | Jun 18 10:19 | depends on CSI/CAugRes |
| CechToHigherDirectImage | ABSENT | ‚Äî | setup.json Jun 18 21:21 (stale pre-split attempt) |

Plan-091 re-triggered LSP elaboration via `lean_file_outline` on Mid1‚ÜíMid2‚ÜíTop‚ÜíAux‚ÜíCSI‚ÜíCHDI chain. Mid1.setup.json updated to 09:40 = elaboration active at sync time.

- iter=91, sha=c9e61e1, added=0, removed=0, duration=112s
- No markers restored; chain must fully build before `\leanok` can be added for main theorem.

## Blueprint Doctor
CLEAN. No orphan chapters, broken refs, new axioms.

- frontier: 4 nodes (Route B residuals, all non-blocking):

  - `lem:tile_section_comparison` (effort=5106, used-by=0) ‚Äî dead end

## Key Findings
- Build speed confirmed ~2‚Äì4K HB/s; Mid1 (5.6M HB) ~47 min at 2K HB/s.
- CSI.olean + CechAugmentedResolution.olean both stale (pre-split Jun 18 19:59); both will force-rebuild once Aux.olean appears.
- CechToHigherDirectImage.olean absent; CHDI.setup.json (Jun 18 21:21) is stale from a pre-split attempt.
- `cech_computes_higherDirectImage` has 0 sorries in source; only awaits full chain olean + sync_leanok to restore `\leanok`.
- No unmatched DAG nodes ‚Äî no coverage debt.
